reviews.reason: Lack of explanation of experience — claims to love kids and mentions classroom but never names employer, setting, or gives concrete details. Vague experience is not enough.
reviews.lesson: When transcript is vague about experience (no employer, no setting, no specifics), FLAG instead of approving. Vague claims are not evidence of formal experience.

reviews.reason: Only answered 1 question. Only experience is Sunday school (informal, older kids). Erica wants denial notes to explain WHY — not just generic location.
reviews.lesson: Denial notes should include the specific reason for denial, not just city/state. Sunday school alone is informal experience with older kids — not sufficient for Georgia.

criteria_updates.rule: Flag candidates who claim experience but give no specifics (no employer, no setting, no concrete details)
Denial notes must include specific reason (e.g. "only teaching Sunday school") — not just location
